goal: semiring_hom_image[S, T](f, s) = set_image[S, T](s, f.hom)

goal: semiring_hom_maps_into_image

goal: semiring_hom_image_subset_iff_subset_preimage
semiring_hom_image[S, U](compose_semiring_hom[S, T, U](f, g), s) = set_image[S, U](s, compose[S, T, U](f.hom, g.hom))

goal: semiring_hom_image[T, U](f, semiring_hom_image[S, T](g, s)) = set_image[T, U](set_image[S, T](s, g.hom), f.hom)
